name: Research Method Pipeline
description: Nature Biomedical Engineering / NeurIPS style method pipeline figures with architecture diagrams.
template:
Create a {prompt}

Style requirements:
- Nature Biomedical Engineering / NeurIPS medical-AI method figure
- Soft Nature/Science palette: muted teal, dusty blue, sage green, warm sand, coral accents
- Left-to-right method pipeline with horizontal bands and panel labels A–C
- White background, precise vector-like arrows, modest shadows only
- Readable labels, lots of whitespace
- No futuristic HUD, no clinical gore, no real hospital logos, no watermark

Density control:
- 4-6 major pipeline stages
- Each stage has clear architectural purpose
- Use whitespace as breathing room between components
- One clear processing flow with supporting modules
